General.Name: Yunnan Water Investment Co Ltd
General.Description: Yunnan Water Investment Co., Limited, an investment holding company, designs, develops, constructs, operates, and maintains municipal water supply, and wastewater and solid waste treatment facilities in the People's Republic of China and internationally. It operates through the Wastewater treatment project construction and operation, Water supply project construction and operation, Construction and Sales of Equipment, Solid waste treatment project construction and operation, and Others segments. The company engages in the construction and operation of wastewater treatment projects, water supply projects, and solid waste treatment projects; sale of engineering and procurement construction and equipment; and provision of build and transfer construction services. It also undertakes operate transfer, build own operate, transfer operate, transfer-operate transfer, transfer own operate, build and transfer, engineering procurement construction, rehabilitate operate transfer, operation, and maintenance related projects. The company was formerly known as Yunnan Water Industry Investment and Development Co., Ltd. Yunnan Water Investment Co., Limited was incorporated in 2014 and is headquartered in Kunming, the People's Republic of China. Yunnan Water Investment Co., Limited is a subsidiary of Yunnan Green Environmental Protection Industry Group Co., Ltd.
